name: Golf Emporium
about: The Golf Emporium is a comprehensive golf facility located in Rockford, MI, that combines a pro shop, driving range, and club fitting services. It features an all-weather Tech Center with Trackman launch monitors for year-round practice and custom club fitting. The venue offers a wide range of name brand golf equipment at discounted prices and is known for its 'Try Before You Buy' policy. It serves as both a retail destination and a training facility, providing services from club sales and repairs to personalized lessons and swing analysis.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Trackman launch monitor technology for precise club and ball flight data
One of the largest club fitting facilities in the country with extensive brand selection
All-weather practice facility allowing for year-round training and fitting sessions
Discounted pricing on top golf equipment brands and a 'Try Before You Buy' policy

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on website
No alcohol service mentioned on website

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor used for fittings and lessons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, they offer club rentals and a 'Try Before You Buy' policy where you can test equipment before purchasing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, so it appears to be a BYOB facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: No specific 18-hole time is mentioned, but single lessons are about 1 hour and fittings take 40-60 minutes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, they mention family-oriented services and a welcoming atmosphere suitable for beginners of all ages.
